import numpy as np


def compute_similarity(vec_a: np.ndarray, vec_b: np.ndarray) -> float:
    return float(np.dot(vec_a, vec_b))


def find_nearest(query_embedding: np.ndarray, corpus_embeddings: np.ndarray) -> int:
    scores = np.dot(corpus_embeddings, query_embedding)
    return int(np.argmax(scores))


def rank_documents(query_vec: list[float], doc_vecs: list[list[float]]) -> list[int]:
    q = np.array(query_vec)
    docs = np.array(doc_vecs)
    similarities = docs @ q
    return list(np.argsort(similarities)[::-1])
